title: BEM-711 real mailbox check
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/handoff','governance/tasks/pending']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 05:29 (UTC+3)'
active_path=Path('governance/agreements/active/bem703_multiagent_strategy_architecture_v21.json')
active={}
if active_path.exists():
    try: active=json.loads(active_path.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception as e: active={'parse_error':str(e)}
responses=[]
for d in [Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt'),Path('governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor')]:
    if d.exists():
        for p in sorted(d.glob('*')):
            if p.is_file():
                txt=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
                low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower(); up=txt.upper()
                if 'bem703' in low or 'bem-703' in low or 'multi-agent strategy' in low or 'v2.1' in low:
                    decision='MESSAGE'
                    if 'APPROVED' in up: decision='APPROVED'
                    if 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in up: decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED'
                    if 'BLOCKED' in up: decision='BLOCKED'
                    responses.append({'path':str(p),'decision':decision,'preview':txt[:800]})
if responses:
    latest=responses[-1]
    handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
    pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/claude_mailbox_autoprocess_next.md')
    handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE READY'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Файл: `'+latest['path']+'`'+sep+'Decision: '+latest['decision']+sep+'Действие: обработать реальный ответ Claude по BEM-703 и довести протокол до результата.'+sep)
    pending.write_text('# Real Claude mailbox autoprocess pending'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Файл: '+latest['path']+sep+'Decision: '+latest['decision']+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. GPT/Codex must process this repo artifact.'+sep)
    status='real_claude_response_found'
    blocker=None
else:
    status='no_real_claude_response_yet'
    blocker={'code':'REAL_CLAUDE_RESPONSE_NOT_FOUND_YET','active_status':active.get('status')}
state={'schema_version':'check_real_claude_mailbox_bem703.v1','bem':'BEM-711','status':status,'active_agreement':active,'responses':responses,'responses_found':len(responses),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem711_check_real_claude_mailbox_bem703.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem711_check_real_claude_mailbox_bem703.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-711 | Check Real Claude Mailbox BEM-703 | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Responses found: '+str(len(responses))+sep+'Active status: '+str(active.get('status'))+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem711_check_real_claude_mailbox_bem703','status':status,'responses_found':len(responses),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem711_check_real_claude_mailbox_bem703.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-711 '+status+' responses_found='+str(len(responses))+'\n')
changed=[str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)]
if responses:
    changed.extend(['governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/tasks/pending/claude_mailbox_autoprocess_next.md'])
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Checked real Claude mailbox for BEM-703 response and prepared handoff/pending artifacts if found')
"""
No issue comments.
